name: spousal-joint-78ltv-silent-complete
rationale: Spousal-joint refi at 78% LTV with broker going silent post-intake. F1 aggregation captures joint applicant info; F4.EL elevated callout fires; F4.CH chase email should fire after silence threshold. Interaction: does chase email correctly address joint applicants (both names, joint salutation), or default to single-applicant phrasing? Layer 3 #6 silent-timing applies + interaction-specific addressing question.
notes: Single-event intake; replay harness drives chase-cron forward. Tests chase-email addressing for joint applicants.
